heading: Restriction on use of funds for assisted suicide, euthanasia, and mercy killing
label: 238o Restriction on use of funds for assisted suicide, euthanasia, and mercy killing
text: Appropriations for carrying out the purposes of this chapter shall not be used in a manner inconsistent with the Assisted Suicide Funding Restriction Act of 1997 [ et seq.].42 U.S.C. 14401
notes: References in TextThe Assisted Suicide Funding Restriction Act of 1997, referred to in text, is , , , which is classified principally to chapter 138 (§ 14401 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 105–12111 Stat. 23section 14401 of this titleApr. 30, 1997
